description: Updated phrasing and additional guidance for custom_instructions.

styles.formal: Respond formally: use professional language, full sentences, and no contractions.
styles.casual: Respond casually: be friendly and approachable, use contractions where natural.
styles.veryformal: Respond in a very formal tone: extremely polite, full sentences, and very conservative phrasing.

default: Please respond in a helpful and neutral tone.
